title: Nanchang, Jiangxi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nanchang, Jiangxi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nanchang is a city in Jiangxi with a population of 6,255,000. Capital of Jiangxi province, a historic city on the Gan River known for its revolutionary heritage and growing aviation industry.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
